Self.Wiki: Defines parameters relating to equippable armor.

armorId.Wiki: The ID for this armor set. Do not forget this when creating custom armor.

armorType.Wiki: The type of armor this is.

armorCategory.Wiki: The category this armor belongs to.

modelId.Wiki: The model to use for this armor.

modelGender.Wiki: The gender to use for this armor model.

clothCollidableId.Wiki: The cloth collidable parameters to use for this armor.

interfereId.Wiki: The parameters for armor interference for this armor.

iconId.Wiki: The icon ID to use for this armor.

armorReinforceId.Wiki: The reinforcement parameters to use for this armor.

defenseStatAffectScale.Wiki: The status effect multiplier applied to defence power.

defenseSlashScale.Wiki: The slash multiplier applied to defence power.

defenseThrustScale.Wiki: The slash multiplier applied to defence power.

defenseStrikeScale.Wiki: The slash multiplier applied to defence power.

prerequisiteStrength.Wiki: The strength requirement to wield this armor.

prerequisiteDexterity.Wiki: The dexterity requirement to wield this armor.

prerequisiteIntelligence.Wiki: The intelligence requirement to wield this armor.

prerequisiteFaith.Wiki: The faith requirement to wield this armor.

repairCost.Wiki: The repair cost (in souls) for this armor.

strong.Wiki: The poise value for this armor.

handsUpWeight.Wiki: The side opening percentage of the arms when this armor is equipped.

handsUpFLevel.Wiki: The arm pit level of the arms when this armor is equipped.

itemDropWeight.Wiki: The correction percentage to apply to Item Discovery when this armor is equipped.

material.Wiki: The hit material to use when this armor is equipped.

brokenSfxId.Wiki: The SFX ID to use when this armor is broken

brokenSoundType.Wiki: The sound type to use when this armor is broken.
